article.title: 七年级下册英语教材语篇文本汇总

sentences.text: The seventh-grade English textbook contains various interesting stories and articles.
Students can improve their reading skills by practicing with these texts.
Each unit focuses on different themes, such as family, school, and hobbies.
By engaging with the material, learners build vocabulary and comprehension abilities.
This interactive approach makes learning English enjoyable and effective.

sentenceTasks.promptZh: 把句子语块按正确顺序拖拽排列

readingQuestions.stem: What is the main purpose of the seventh-grade English textbook?
readingQuestions.rationaleZh: 根据文章内容，教材旨在通过练习提高阅读技能。

readingQuestions.stem: Which themes are mentioned in the units?
readingQuestions.rationaleZh: 文章明确指出单元主题包括家庭、学校和爱好。

readingQuestions.stem: How does the interactive approach affect learning?
readingQuestions.rationaleZh: 文章最后一句说明互动方法使学习英语变得愉快和有效。

quoteCandidates.reasonZh: 这句话简洁地表达了互动学习的积极效果，语言优美且鼓舞人心。

reading skills.usageZh: 常用复数形式，搭配：develop/improve reading skills (培养/提高阅读技能)
reading skills.example: Good reading skills are essential for academic success. (良好的阅读技能对学业成功至关重要。)

comprehension abilities.usageZh: 常用复数形式，搭配：test/assess comprehension abilities (测试/评估理解能力)
comprehension abilities.example: The teacher focuses on developing students' comprehension abilities. (老师专注于培养学生的理解能力。)

interest.usageZh: 可数名词，搭配：show/take/have interest in (对...表现出/产生/有兴趣)
interest.example: He has a great interest in science fiction. (他对科幻小说有浓厚的兴趣。)

skill.usageZh: 可数名词，搭配：acquire/master a skill (掌握/精通一项技能)
skill.example: Communication is an important skill in the workplace. (沟通是职场中的一项重要技能。)

text.usageZh: 可数名词，搭配：read/analyze a text (阅读/分析文字材料)
text.example: Please read the text carefully before answering the questions. (请在回答问题前仔细阅读文字材料。)
